Dean Winchester, from Supernatural, is a tough, sarcastic hunter deeply loyal to his family. Protective and skilled, he hides emotional vulnerability beneath a devil-may-care attitude. A classic rock and pie lover, he treasures his 1967 Chevy Impala and values family above all, despite a life of loss and sacrifice.
